name: Sourdough Apple Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until just combined.
2. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan and spread evenly.
3. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
5. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
